item.title: Impressum
item.description: Impressum Angaben gemäß § 5 TMG Patrick Stigler Deutschland Kontakt E-Mail: root@stigler.de Verantwortlich für den Inhalt nach § 55 Abs. 2 RStV Patrick Stigler Deutschland Haftungsausschluss (Disclaimer) Haftung für Inhalte Als Diensteanbieter sind wir gemäß § 7 Abs.1 TMG für eigene Inhalte auf diesen Seiten nach den allgemeinen Gesetzen verantwortlich. Nach §§ 8 bis 10 TMG sind wir als Diensteanbieter jedoch nicht verpflichtet, übermittelte oder gespeicherte fremde Informationen zu überwachen oder nach Umständen zu forschen, die auf eine rechtswidrige Tätigkeit hinweisen.

item.title: Portfolio
item.description: About me My name is Patrick Stigler, and I am an experienced IT professional with a strong background in technology integration, project management, and innovation. I specialize in the integration of innovative technologies to drive business success. Technical Skills Innovation Management: Innovation, Mentoring, Organizational Skills Academic Liaison: Leadership, Resilience, Continuous Learning Process Optimization: Analytical Thinking, Organizational Skills Artificial Intelligence: Machine Vision, Generative AI, Prompt Engineering Rapid Prototyping: 3D Printing, Milling, Turning, CAD, PCB Design Internet of Things: LoRa, ESP32, MQTT, Raspberry Pi Certifications Bosch Specialist Development Program: Robert Bosch GmbH, Stuttgart Microsoft Certified Professional: Microsoft Microsoft Technology Associate: Microsoft Professional Experience IT Solutions Architect at Robert Bosch GmbH, Stuttgart, Germany Jan 2020 - Present

item.title: Projects
item.description: Projects Simracing Custom Racing Wheel (Hobby) 2022 - 2023 Designing, building, and crafting Carbon frame, aluminum buttons and shifter 3D-scanned ergonomic features Software and electronics Acquired proficiency in Fusion 360 during the project Rebuild a Motorcycle (Hobby) Customized and enhanced unique features Rebuilt a motorcycle Repairing and replacing parts Upgraded components for improved performance 3D Printer (Hobby) 2019 - 2020 Deep understanding of the processes of 3D printing Designed and constructed a custom 3D printer from scratch Software, mechanics *This page showcases a selection of projects I have completed over the years.
